div.h1: Looks like this page has gone surfing

div.div: A minor roadblock in your journey

div.p: ... but please take a moment to reflect on where you could be. Like the serene oceanfront in the Maldives. Or in balmy Hawaii. Or in another of our many enchanting beach locations.
